title: Crispy Spanish Sweet Potato Skillet
description: A quick, sweet, and slightly spicy skillet dish with garam masala, perfect for a solo dinner thats both paleo-friendly and bursting with Mediterranean flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast‑iron skillet over medium‑high heat until shimmering.
Add the sweet potato cubes and let them sear, stirring occasionally, until they develop a golden crust (about 8–10 minutes).
Stir in the garam masala, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper; cook for 1–2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced onion, bell pepper, and minced garlic; sauté until the vegetables soften and the sweet potatoes remain crispy, about 4–5 minutes.
Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the oven preheated to 400 °F (200 °C) and roast for 5 minutes to finish browning.
Remove from heat, sprinkle chopped cilantro or parsley over the top, and serve immediately.
